heroInsight: Carousels are dominating the algorithm with 59% of posts and an average engagement score of 74, outperforming static posts by over 3x in likes and comments.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are the current leader in engagement, likely due to the interactive nature and multiple opportunities to capture attention across slides.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels maintain a steady presence but aren't seeing the same push as carousels

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels are seeing high save rates, engaging users with swipe-through content

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories remain consistent but don't yield the same engagement as carousels

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts are less engaging, averaging lower likes and comments

trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Creates a commitment signal and fosters community participation, boosting comments and shares.

trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Creates curiosity and invites debate, leading to a spike in comments.

trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Visual impact and aspirational element drive shares and comments.

trendingHooks.example: Outfit of the day: YoungLA haul
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Combines fashion appeal with gym culture, engaging both fitness and style communities.

postingTimes.summary: Peak engagement times are in the early morning and late afternoon, aligning with pre- and post-workout routines.
